English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
William Tomek papers
Tomek, William G., 1932-
21-43-3918
2 cubic feet. 2 cubic feet.
1957-2010 Publications, Course material Includes publications, presentations and course material. Collection material in English 7323628
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
August 2011
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, August 2011
Date modified:
RMC Staff, August 2011
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor emeritus of Applied Economics and Management, Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes publications, presentations and course material.
Cite As:
William Tomek papers, #21-43-3918 . Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Agricultural prices -- United States. Agriculture -- Economic aspects. Cornell University -- : Faculty.
